relationships: kab:Tom yejreḥ deg uεrur mi yella yetturar tinis
kab:Amek ay as-tetteddud i tyaziḍt mi ara tili s tadist ﹖
kab:Mass Tanaka yeɣṛa-d mi akken ur telliḍ ara da
kab:Mass Tanaka yeɣṛa-d mi akken ur tellim ara da
kab:Nezmer ad nɛawed ad neg deg-s laman mi ara yerreẓ ﹖
kab:Mass Tanaka yeɣṛa-d mi akken ur tellimt ara da
kab:Sarameɣ ulac win i k-yeẓran mi txedmeḍ ayay
kab:Ttruḥeɣ ad urareɣ tinis mi d-ffɣeɣ seg uɣerbaz
kab:Sarameɣ ulac win i kem-yeẓran mi txedmeḍ ayay
